# Pickvolt

> Pickvolt is an AI-powered tech product comparison platform. Users can compare any two smartphones, laptops, or tablets and instantly receive an AI-generated verdict with reasoning, spec breakdowns, and a performance analysis. No affiliate links. No sponsored results.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://www.pickvolt.com/): Start a product comparison or browse trending comparisons
- [Compare](https://www.pickvolt.com/compare): AI-powered side-by-side product comparison tool — enter two products and get an instant verdict
- [Smartphones](https://www.pickvolt.com/categories/smartphone): Browse, filter, and explore smartphone products with full specifications
- [Laptops](https://www.pickvolt.com/categories/laptop): Browse, filter, and explore laptop products with full specifications
- [Tablets](https://www.pickvolt.com/categories/tablet): Browse, filter, and explore tablet products with full specifications
- [Pricing](https://www.pickvolt.com/pricing): Free plan (5 comparisons/month) and Pro plan ($12/month, unlimited)

## About

- [About](https://www.pickvolt.com/about): Mission, how it works, and the team behind Pickvolt
- [Contact](https://www.pickvolt.com/contact): General inquiries at vandalroof@gmail.com, privacy inquiries at privacy@pickvolt.com

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.pickvolt.com/privacy): Data collection, third-party services, and retention policies
- [Terms of Service](https://www.pickvolt.com/terms): Usage terms, Pro subscription terms, and disclaimers
- [Cookie Policy](https://www.pickvolt.com/cookies): Cookie types and how to manage consent

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- Pickvolt does NOT use affiliate links or receive compensation for comparison results
- AI verdicts are generated using large language models and are for informational purposes only
- Product specs are sourced from official manufacturer pages
- Free users: 5 comparisons per month. Pro users: unlimited comparisons + history
- Supported categories: smartphone, laptop, tablet
- Supported languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German, Japanese, Korean
